_fixtureNote: HAND-MODELED, not a live capture. A live sample of ~15 diverse Smithery servers (2026-07-04, see docs/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md OQ-3) never returned a populated `annotations` object on any tool. This fixture proves the mapping path (RawSmitheryTool.annotations -> FederatedTool.annotations -> the gate's annotation_hints check) works the moment upstream does populate it; it is not evidence that Smithery currently does.
